jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Infosys
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
